chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application Nos. 545, 546, 547 & 548 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For order on CMA No. 2536/24. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For order on CMA No. 2537/24. 20.11.2025 Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for the applicant. Under instructions, learned counsel does not press these reference applications alongwith listed applications, which are dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in the connected files. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
